trait_definition: 0=no visible inner spots or guide; 1=few/faint inner spots; 2=clear inner guide; 3=dense or high-contrast inner guide.
predeclared_rationale: Source-locked focal lineage; this adds only C-rank image-derived guide direction, while flower size and mating channels remain source-locked.

trait_definition: 0=plain/low-contrast petal display; 1=weak guide or colour contrast; 2=clear guide or colour contrast; 3=strong petal guide or colour contrast.
predeclared_rationale: Only preclassified specialist-bee candidate with at least two research-grade photo records in mainland, Oshima and pooled no-Bombus regions under the current fixed proxy audit.

trait_definition: 0=no visible petal/throat contrast in an open flower; 1=weak contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=strong contrasting throat, petal mark, or colour display.
predeclared_rationale: Independent floral-comparison lineage; photos test only the directional visual-signal prediction. Current photo coverage is insufficient, so retain primarily for original-source recovery.

trait_definition: 0=visually cryptic corolla display; 1=weak visible colour contrast; 2=clear colour display; 3=highly conspicuous flower display.
predeclared_rationale: Bee-specialist candidate from source-backed functional group classification; current photo coverage is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=no visible corolla/throat contrast; 1=weak contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=strong visible corolla or throat contrast.
predeclared_rationale: Tubular bee-specialist candidate; current photo coverage is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=cryptic head display; 1=weak visible head contrast; 2=clear flower-head colour display; 3=highly conspicuous flower-head display.
predeclared_rationale: Thistle specialist candidate; score display only, not pollinator identity; current photo coverage is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=plain/low-contrast petal display; 1=weak colour or guide contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=strong petal colour or guide contrast.
predeclared_rationale: Long-tubed specialist candidate; current photo coverage is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=no visible corolla contrast; 1=weak contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=strong visible corolla or inner-throat contrast.
predeclared_rationale: Campanulaceae specialist candidate; current photo coverage is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=cryptic head display; 1=weak ray/disc or colour contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=highly conspicuous head display.
predeclared_rationale: Open generalist negative-control cohort; three-regime card availability already passes the initial two-cards-per-bin screen.

trait_definition: 0=cryptic umbel display; 1=weak contrast; 2=clear white/green floral display; 3=highly conspicuous umbel display.
predeclared_rationale: Open generalist negative-control cohort; low mainland availability may exclude it.

trait_definition: 0=cryptic head display; 1=weak ray/disc contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=highly conspicuous head display.
predeclared_rationale: Open generalist negative-control cohort; three-regime card availability already passes the initial two-cards-per-bin screen.

trait_definition: 0=cryptic umbel display; 1=weak contrast; 2=clear floral display; 3=highly conspicuous umbel display.
predeclared_rationale: Open generalist negative-control cohort; current card balance is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=no visible corolla contrast; 1=weak contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=strong visible corolla display.
predeclared_rationale: Open generalist negative-control cohort; current mainland card availability is insufficient.

trait_definition: 0=cryptic flower display; 1=weak petal/stamen contrast; 2=clear contrast; 3=highly conspicuous flower display.
